content: Vercel Cron Jobs: configured in vercel.json under crons array with path + schedule (UTC cron syntax). Triggers HTTP GET to production URL. Free tier: up to 2 cron jobs, 1/day frequency minimum. Pro tier: more jobs, up to 1/minute frequency. Function timeouts: Hobby 10s, Pro 300s (5min). No retry logic built in. Best for simple scheduled tasks like daily digest emails. Vercel blocks SMTP but HTTP-based email APIs (Resend) work fine. Configuration: {crons: [{path: '/api/cron/daily-digest', schedule: '0 9 * * *'}]}.
